Package com.saperion.intf

Interface SaEventFilter

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
SaRMIEventFilter
public interface SaEventFilter extends Serializable
Defines the event filters. The filter means that an event will be fired only for specified documents from the backend. The ddc name, event type and an array of the filters form the event filter.
See Also:
  • SaConstants.EVENT_TYPE_CREATE
  • SaConstants.EVENT_TYPE_UPDATE
  • SaConstants.EVENT_TYPE_DELETE
